channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: National Unity Party Threatens to Exit House Majority Bloc Due to Unreleased Infrastructure and Social Funds
item.description: The National Unity Party (NUP), headed by Chairman and Deputy Speaker Ronaldo Puno of Antipolo City, is expressing strong dissatisfaction with House Speaker Faustino 'Bojie' Dy III's leadership. Puno ...

item.title: Decline in Giving Pledge Participation Highlights Shifts in Tech Philanthropy
item.description: In 2010, Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched the Giving Pledge, encouraging the world's wealthiest individuals to commit to donating over half their fortunes during their lifetimes or after death. ...

item.title: Political Themes Have Long Influenced the Oscars
item.description: The Oscars have long been intertwined with politics, with Hollywood’s biggest night often reflecting broader social and political currents. From the McCarthyism era to the present day, political issue...

item.title: Key Highlights and Winners from the 2026 Oscars Ceremony
item.description: Sunday night’s Oscar ceremony brought together Hollywood’s biggest stars for a night filled with humour, emotion, and some surprising firsts. Host Conan O’Brien opened the show with a mix of sharp jok...

item.title: Highlights and Memorable Moments from the 2026 Oscars
item.description: The 2026 Oscars delivered a mix of light-hearted comedy, striking fashion, and unforgettable red carpet interactions. Conan O’Brien, returning as host, kept his monologue sharp and witty, playfully te...

item.title: New Plankton Species Evolved Within Thousands of Years After Chicxulub Impact
item.description: Approximately 66 million years ago, the Chicxulub asteroid impact triggered massive global fires, climate shifts, and the extinction of dinosaurs and many other species. However, a new study from the ...

item.title: Iran appreciates Pakistan’s support amid US-Israel tensions
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has expressed deep gratitude to Pakistan for showing strong support and solidarity with Iran during the ongoing tensions with the United States and Israel. Post...

item.title: Indian Student in Canada Dies After Being Assaulted, Family in Ujjain Waits for Body
item.description: A tragic incident has occurred in Canada where Gurkirat Singh Manocha, an Indian student studying in Fort St. John, was reportedly assaulted and run over. The student sustained severe injuries and suc...

item.title: Patient watchdog warns of rising private healthcare use due to long NHS waiting times
item.description: A patient watchdog, Healthwatch England, has raised concerns about the emergence of a two-tier health system in England, as increasing numbers of people pay for private sector tests, scans, and treatm...

item.title: Governor Okpebholo Supports Ossiomo Power Plant Expansion and Electricity Supply in Edo Central
item.description: Recent clarification don clear say Governor Monday Okpebholo and him administration dey support the expansion of Ossiomo Power Plant, wey dey provide electricity to Okada and other communities for Edo...

item.title: Limpopo Remains on Flood Alert Amid Ongoing Heavy Rain, with Other Key Updates in SA News
item.description: Limpopo province is currently on high alert as persistent heavy rainfall over the past few days has led to widespread flooding in several districts. Authorities report damage to roads and the submerge...

item.title: Tumbler Ridge named Hockeyville finalist and awarded $50,000 for arena improvements
item.description: Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, has been named a regional finalist in the 2026 edition of the annual Hockeyville contest. This year, 13 communities across Canada, one from each province and territory...

item.title: Full List of 98th Oscar Winners and Their Achievements
item.description: For dis 2026 Oscars, the Dolby Theatre for Los Angeles turn serious wahala as 'One Battle After Another' carry six awards come back house, including Best Picture, Best Director, and Best Adapted Scree...

item.title: Tanzania to start direct cargo transport from Dar Port via SGR
item.description: The Tanzanian government is set to start moving cargo directly from the Port of Dar es Salaam using the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) by the end of March 2026. This new system will reduce congestion at...

item.title: Antony Catalano Steps Down Amid Assault Allegations, Business Impact Grows
item.description: Media mogul Antony Catalano, former Domain CEO and owner of multiple regional newspapers, faces serious legal troubles after being charged with assault, false imprisonment, and threats to kill a woman...

item.title: Army deny IPOB’s claims about fake IED pictures, say images came from real South-East operations
item.description: The Nigerian Army don talk say the Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB) and their supporters dey use tribe-based propaganda to scatter correct information about military work wey dem dey do for the Sout...

item.title: Jeepney drivers plan nationwide strike on March 19 over fuel price hikes
item.description: Jeepney drivers under the transport group PISTON announced a nationwide strike on March 19 to protest the soaring fuel prices, which have reached P100 per liter. PISTON President Mody Floranda stated ...

item.title: Wilbert Tolentino achieves college degree at age 50
item.description: Wilbert Tolentino, a Filipino entrepreneur and public personality, recently completed his college education at the age of 50. Despite years of focusing on his business ventures and public engagements,...

item.title: Dubai Airport Flights Resume Following Temporary Suspension Due to Drone Incident
item.description: Flights at Dubai International Airport were briefly disrupted on Monday morning when a drone struck a fuel tank near the airport amid rising tensions in West Asia. Dubai authorities confirmed that the...

item.title: Fifteen-vehicle collision on M73 in Scotland leaves five people hospitalised, including two children
item.description: Emergency services responded to a significant road traffic collision involving 15 vehicles on the northbound carriageway of the M73 motorway in Scotland on Sunday evening, 15 March 2026. The incident ...
